name: rapid7-bulk-export
description: Export and analyze Rapid7 InsightVM vulnerability data via SQL queries
long_description: Connects to the Rapid7 Bulk Export API to fetch vulnerability and asset data, loads it into a local DuckDB database, and exposes SQL query tools for AI-powered security analysis. Supports export reuse, EPSS-based prioritization, and cross-cloud vulnerability tracking.

tools.name: start_rapid7_export
tools.description: Start a new Rapid7 export job (instant, non-blocking). Returns an export ID. For remediation exports, automatically splits date ranges exceeding 31 days into chunks.

tools.name: check_rapid7_export_status
tools.description: Check the current status of a Rapid7 export job (instant, non-blocking).

tools.name: download_rapid7_export
tools.description: Download a completed Rapid7 export and load it into the database for querying.

tools.name: load_rapid7_parquet
tools.description: Load Rapid7 vulnerability data from existing local Parquet files.

tools.name: query_rapid7
tools.description: Execute SQL queries against the Rapid7 vulnerability database.

tools.name: get_rapid7_schema
tools.description: Get the Rapid7 database table schemas and column types.

tools.name: get_rapid7_stats
tools.description: Get summary statistics about the loaded Rapid7 vulnerability data.

tools.name: list_rapid7_exports
tools.description: List recent Rapid7 exports tracked in the system.

api_key.title: Rapid7 API Key
api_key.description: Your Rapid7 InsightVM API key (User or Organization key). Generate one at Administration > API Key Management in the Rapid7 Insight Platform.

region.title: Rapid7 Region
region.description: Your Rapid7 data storage region: us, eu, ca, au, or ap. Find this under your account name in the Insight Platform.
